title: v3Organization
description: JSON Schema for v3Organization, extracted from The Things Stack v3.36 api.swagger.json

ids.description: The identifiers of the organization. These are public and can be seen by any authenticated user in the network.

created_at.description: When the organization was created. This information is public and can be seen by any authenticated user in the network.

updated_at.description: When the organization was last updated. This information is public and can be seen by any authenticated user in the network.

deleted_at.description: When the organization was deleted. This information is public and can be seen by any authenticated user in the network.

name.description: The name of the organization. This information is public and can be seen by any authenticated user in the network.

attributes.description: Key-value attributes for this organization. Typically used for organizing organizations or for storing integration-specific data.

contact_info.description:
Contact information for this organization. Typically used to indicate who to contact with security/billing questions about the organization.
This field is deprecated. Use administrative_contact and technical_contact instead.

fanout_notifications.description:
Determines if a notification will be sent to the collaborators. If false it, notifications will be sent only to the
administrative or technical contact.

organization_id.description: This ID shares namespace with user IDs.

v3OrganizationOrUserIdentifiers.description: OrganizationOrUserIdentifiers contains either organization or user identifiers.

user_id.description: This ID shares namespace with organization IDs.

email.description: Secondary identifier, which can only be used in specific requests.
